PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TYLER, ALFRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS GETACHEW, LEGESSE HENNING, KARA $2,150.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,150.00, THE PERCENTAGE OF LIABILITY ATTRIBUTABLE TO PLAINTIFF AND TO DEFENDANTS IS PLAINTIFF ALFRED TYLER 50% TO DEFENDANTS LUXO R CABS AND LEGESSE GETACHEW 40% TO DEFENDANT KARA HENNING 10 % EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
